# Agent Review: {{stage}} — {{agent_role}}

## Scoring Rubric

Use a score from 1 to 5 for each dimension.

| Score | Meaning |
|------:|---------|
| 1 | Critically insufficient |
| 2 | Material gaps remain |
| 3 | Partially usable with follow-up |
| 4 | Strong and largely ready |
| 5 | Fully ready from this review perspective |

## Decision Summary

- recommendation: proceed / proceed-with-conditions / stop-and-clarify
- confidence_score: 1-5
- one_line_rationale: ""

## Dynamic Output (Scenario-specific)

### cannot-start

- Checklist gaps and score-improvement questions must be provided.

### startable

- Checklist, score, and feature suggestions must be provided.

### completed

- Focus on optimization questions and follow-up feature opportunities.
